1930|argentina|81|monti.frase: only succumbing to an 81st-minute goal scored from a Monti free kick

1934|suica|7|kielholz.frase: Switzerland took an early lead thanks to Leopold Kielholz finishing off a good piece of play from André Abegglen.

1934|argentina|4|belis.frase: Argentina took the lead with a 25-yard free kick by Ernesto Belis.

1934|franca|116|verriest.frase: In the extra time, Austria prevailed and scored twice before France got a late second goal from the spot.

1934|suica|18|kielholz.frase: In a well-balanced game, Switzerland took the lead with Kielholz thanks to a counter-attacking play.

1938|belgica|38|isemborghs.frase: the lead was halved before the interval thanks to Hendrik Isemborghs, who connected with a free kick from Bernard Voorhoof

1938|italia|51|piola.frase: in doing so, they left themselves open for the lethal Italian counter-attack. Silvio Piola scored a brace while unmarked

1938|italia|72|piola.frase: in doing so, they left themselves open for the lethal Italian counter-attack. Silvio Piola scored a brace while unmarked

1954|alemanha|18|rahn.frase: The second corner kick came long and high, finding Rahn, who leveled the score.

1962|chile|11|sanchez.frase: Eleven minutes into the game Leonel Sánchez opened the score with a free kick from wide on the right that surprised Lev Yashin at the near post.

1962|brasil|31|garrincha.frase: Garrincha opened the score at the half hour when he headed in a corner by Mário Zagallo.

1962|brasil|53|vava.frase: Brazil regained advantage after Vavá headed in a free kick from Garrincha

1966|portugal|82|eusebio.frase: Portugal's goal coming from a penalty in the 82nd minute after a handball by Jack Charlton on the goal line.

1966|inglaterra|78|peters.frase: England won a corner. Alan Ball delivered the ball to Geoff Hurst whose deflected shot from the edge of the area found Martin Peters. He produced the final shot, beating the West German keeper from eight yards

1970|brasil|86|carlosalberto.frase: Carlos Alberto's goal, after a series of moves by the Brazilian team from the left to the centre, is considered one of the greatest goals ever scored in the history of the tournament.

1974|paisesbaixos|2|neeskens.frase: the Dutch took the lead from the ensuing penalty by Johan Neeskens before any German player had even touched the ball.

1974|alemanha|25|breitner.frase: they were awarded a penalty of their own in the 25th minute after Bernd Hölzenbein was fouled within the Dutch area. Paul Breitner took responsibility for the kick and scored.

1982|franca|39|genghini.frase: France dispatched Austria 1–0 with a free kick goal by Bernard Genghini

1982|franca|26|platini.frase: the French equalised nine minutes later with a Michel Platini penalty

1982|italia|81|altobelli.frase: Alessandro Altobelli, at the end of a counterattack by winger Bruno Conti, made it 3–0 with another low left footed shot.

1986|alemanha|87|matthaus.frase: Morocco held out until the 87th minute, when Lothar Matthäus scored the only goal of the match with a free kick.

1990|alemanha|85|brehme.frase: Andreas Brehme took his place and converted the spot kick with a low, right-footed shot to the goalkeeper's right.

1994|argentina|16|batistuta.frase: After Batistuta's penalty kick and Balbo's rebound Argentina attacked desperately but couldn't score for the third time.

1994|brasil|73|bebeto.frase: In the 72nd minute, Romário recovered the ball in midfield, ran to the American's box and delivered it to Bebeto, who finished the play by shooting just between Tony Meola and the post.

1998|franca|27|zidane.frase: outjumping Leonardo to connect with a header from an in-swinging corner from the right taken by Petit

1998|franca|45|zidane.frase: France won another corner a minute later, which was taken on the left by Djorkaeff into the penalty area, where Zidane once again headed the ball into the goal

1998|franca|90|petit.frase: Vieira then put his Arsenal teammate Petit through on goal with a first-touch through ball, and Petit finished low to Taffarel's left.

1998|italia|18|vieri.frase: Christian Vieri scored his fifth goal of the finals and the only one of the game in the 18th minute with exquisite precision, bursting on to Luigi Di Biagio's pass 40 yards from goal.

2002|irlanda|90|robbiekeane.frase: a penalty converted by Robbie Keane low to the left corner of the net to make it 1-1

2002|turquia|12|davala.frase: In the 12th minute, Ergün Penbe sent in a corner for Turkey where Ümit Davala managed to head the ball beyond goalkeeper Seigo Narazaki

2002|inglaterra|5|ferdinand.frase: David Beckham launched a corner towards Rio Ferdinand, whose header was fumbled by Thomas Sørensen into the net

2002|alemanha|88|neuville.frase: Michael Ballack passed to Bernd Schneider whose cross from the right was turned in by Oliver Neuville on the half volley at the near post from six yards out.

2002|estadosunidos|8|mcbride.frase: Claudio Reyna managed to run through the right-hand side before sending the ball to Josh Wolff, who then switched the ball over to Brian McBride who struck the ball into the net.

2002|estadosunidos|65|donovan.frase: Eddie Lewis ran through the left-hand side before sending the ball towards Donovan who headed the ball home.

2002|brasil|67|ronaldo.frase: a sequence that started with Ronaldo winning the ball from Hamann in the German half of the pitch. He passed to Rivaldo, who struck a low shot towards goal.

2002|brasil|79|ronaldo.frase: Kléberson passed towards Rivaldo, who was in the centre of the pitch just outside the German penalty area. Rivaldo let the ball go through his legs, and the pace on Kléberson's pass found Ronaldo.

2006|italia|90|totti.frase: Despite pleas from the Australian players, the penalty stood, and Francesco Totti struck the resultant penalty into the top left corner.

2006|franca|7|zidane.frase: Zinedine Zidane opened the scoring when he converted this kick in the 7th minute with a Panenka that glanced off the underside of the crossbar and into the goal.

2006|italia|19|materazzi.frase: Materazzi redeemed himself for Italy when he levelled the score in the 19th minute, a header from an Andrea Pirlo corner.

2010|estadosunidos|62|donovan.frase: Landon Donovan equalised with a penalty kick in the 62nd minute, which was awarded after Jonathan Mensah fouled Clint Dempsey.

2010|eslovaquia|90|vittek.frase: Róbert Vittek slotted a penalty kick late in stoppage time, but it was no more than a consolation goal for Slovakia.

2010|brasil|35|juan.frase: Brazil's first goal came from a corner kick taken by Maicon in the 34th minute, with Juan heading the ball into the goal without being marked.

2010|alemanha|68|thomasmuller.frase: His first came at the end of a swift German counter-attack in the 67th minute, the goal being assisted by Bastian Schweinsteiger.

2014|brasil|18|davidluiz.frase: Brazil opened the scoring when Thiago Silva flicked on a corner kick before David Luiz turned the ball into the net with his thigh.

2014|paisesbaixos|88|sneijder.frase: Mexico led until the 88th minute, when a Dutch corner was headed back by substitute Klaas-Jan Huntelaar for Wesley Sneijder to equalise with a hard shot from 16 yards.

2014|paisesbaixos|90|huntelaar.frase: Arjen Robben drew a very controversial penalty for the Netherlands after being fouled by Rafael Márquez on the right of the penalty area, which Huntelaar converted to win the match for the Netherlands.

2014|franca|79|pogba.frase: The opening goal came with 11 minutes to play when Pogba headed into the net after a mistake by Enyeama where he failed to hold onto a corner kick from the left by Mathieu Valbuena.

2014|alemanha|13|hummels.frase: Mats Hummels got ahead of his marker Raphaël Varane to head Germany into the lead from ten yards out after a free-kick from Toni Kroos on the left.

2014|brasil|7|thiagosilva.frase: Brazil took the lead in the 7th minute, when Neymar's corner from the left was turned in from close range by Thiago Silva.

2014|brasil|69|davidluiz.frase: Brazil doubled the lead in the 69th minute when David Luiz scored directly from a long-range free kick, side-footing the ball over the wall and into the top-right corner

2014|colombia|80|rodriguez.frase: Colombia reduced the deficit with 10 minutes to go, when James Rodríguez converted a penalty kick low into the left corner and sent the goalkeeper the wrong way.

2014|alemanha|12|thomasmuller.frase: Germany took the lead in the 11th minute, Thomas Müller volleying in Toni Kroos's corner.

2014|alemanha|23|klose.frase: Miroslav Klose scored Germany's second goal, after a passing move saw him set up by Kroos, his first shot was saved by Brazil goalkeeper Júlio César, but he slotted in the rebound.

2014|paisesbaixos|3|vanpersie.frase: The Netherlands opened the scoring within three minutes, after Van Persie converted a penalty kick awarded for a foul on Arjen Robben by Thiago Silva.

2018|franca|13|griezmann.frase: Griezmann stepped up and converted from the spot, sending the ball low to Armani's right.

2018|franca|38|griezmann.frase: The penalty was taken by Griezmann in the 38th minute, and he scored with a low kick into the left-hand corner.

2018|inglaterra|5|trippier.frase: Kieran Trippier found the top right corner of the net from the resulting free kick with his right foot.

2018|portugal|55|pepe.frase: In the 55th minute, Raphaël Guerreiro delivered a cross from a short corner on the left, which Pepe finished with a downward header.

2018|belgica|13|fernandinho.frase: It was Belgium who scored from their first corner of the game in the 13th minute

2018|inglaterra|30|maguire.frase: Ashley Young's outswinging corner from the left finding Harry Maguire, goalkeeper Robin Olsen and Ola Toivonen on the line unable to stop the defender's downward header.

2018|belgica|69|vertonghen.frase: Jan Vertonghen's looping header from the left eluded goalkeeper Eiji Kawashima and landed in the right corner of the net after a corner caused chaos in the Japan penalty area

2018|croacia|101|vida.frase: Croatia took the lead as Domagoj Vida nodded down past Igor Akinfeev and into the right corner of the net after a corner from the right.

2018|colombia|90|mina.frase: Yerry Mina scoring a downward header from a Juan Cuadrado corner from the right in injury time.

2018|belgica|31|debruyne.frase: Belgium doubled their lead by breaking from a Brazil corner in the 31st minute, after Romelu Lukaku collected the ball, turned, and embarked on a 40-yard run with a pass at the end to free Kevin De Bruyne.

2022|argentina|23|lionelmessi.frase: Lionel Messi scored the penalty with a low shot to the right corner.

2022|argentina|36|dimaria.frase: Di Maria finished a sweeping Argentina counter-attack to make it 2–0, shooting with his left foot over the goalkeeper to the right corner of the net

2022|franca|80|kylianmbappe.frase: Mbappé first-time volleying a lofted pass from Marcus Thuram with his right foot as he was falling to the ground to the bottom-right corner of the net to make the game 2–2.

2022|franca|118|kylianmbappe.frase: Mbappé scored his third goal with his penalty kick to the left, sending Martínez the wrong way.

2022|paisesbaixos|10|depay.frase: Memphis Depay received a ball from the right from Denzel Dumfries and finished into the left corner

2022|paisesbaixos|45|blind.frase: Daley Blind made it 2–0 for the Dutch with another low finish, receiving the ball on the right from Dumfries

2022|paisesbaixos|81|dumfries.frase: Dumfries sealed the win with a third goal for the Netherlands five minutes later, adding to his two assists with a side-footed finish at the far post from Blind's cross

2022|franca|44|giroud.frase: Giroud received a pass from Kylian Mbappé before firing low to the right corner of the net to put France into the lead

2022|franca|74|kylianmbappe.frase: Mbappé made it 2–0 in the 74th minute, when he received the ball on the left just inside the penalty area before firing powerfully into the top left corner

2022|inglaterra|38|henderson.frase: Jordan Henderson scored low into the net from twelve yards off a pass from Jude Bellingham on the left

2022|inglaterra|45|kane.frase: Harry Kane made it 2–0 with his first goal of the tournament, firing into the net from the right after a pass from Phil Foden

2022|inglaterra|57|saka.frase: Foden crossed from the left for Bukayo Saka to make it 3–0 with a clipped left-footed finish over Senegal goalkeeper Édouard Mendy

2022|japao|43|maeda.frase: Daizen Maeda scored the opener for Japan with a low finish in the penalty area, after the ball was knocked back to him from the left

2022|polonia|90|lewandowski.frase: Robert Lewandowski pulled a goal back for Poland to make it 3–1 with a penalty low to the left corner
